hero.tagline1: A full-stack developer specializing in scalable architectures and performance optimization. Based in

about.title: About Me
about.p1: With over 5 years of experience as a full-stack developer, I specialize in building scalable architectures and optimizing performance, with a strong focus on frontend technologies.
about.p2: I am passionate about solving complex technical challenges and mentoring developers to align technical execution with business outcomes. My goal is to create applications that enhance user experience and efficiency through collaborative leadership and innovative problem-solving.

chat.initial_message: Hi! I'm Burak's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his experience or skills!

projects.title: Side Project Case Studies
projects.subtitle: Public preview builds used to document architecture decisions, reliability work, and product-readiness tradeoffs.
projects.showcaseDescription: These projects are shared as engineering case studies. They are helpful for reviewing architecture, UI, data, and reliability decisions, but they are not production-ready products yet.

ritualgymtracker.summary: Workout tracking case study focused on offline sync, guest migration, streak correctness, and timezone-safe analytics.
ritualgymtracker.readinessNote: Work in progress · public preview only

bookmarkanalyzer.summary: Bookmark workflow case study focused on local-first storage, AI enrichment, SSRF defense, and reader sanitization.
bookmarkanalyzer.readinessNote: Work in progress · public preview only

subtrackerrr.summary: Subscription tracking case study focused on billing correctness, Firebase auth safety, and persistence integrity.
subtrackerrr.readinessNote: Work in progress · public preview only

fintrackerrr.summary: Portfolio analytics case study focused on normalized asset data, dividend insights, and large-table UI performance.
fintrackerrr.readinessNote: Work in progress · public preview only
